name: Split Sops (British)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove green tops and roots of leeks. Cut the white section in half lengthwise, then once across the middle. Wash thoroughly.
2. Melt butter in a heavy saucepan. Toss the leeks to coat them, and sauté over a gentle flame until they begin to wilt (about 5 minutes).
3. Add wine, salt, and pepper to taste. Simmer an additional 10 to 15 minutes until the leeks are tender.
4. Blend in beurre manie to thicken just before serving.
5. Serve in soup bowls over toast or croutons.
